etimesBrace for a cold shock: Snowfall, rain return to Shimla and Kullu; IMD sounds yellow alertHimachal Pradesh is bracing for another spell of rain and snowfall as the meteorological department has issued yellow alerts for several districts. Light to moderate precipitation is expected from March 28th night through March 30th, with higher reaches likely to receive snow. Temperatures are predicted to drop significantly, bringing a chilly spell to the region.

etimesMeet Luisa Laemmel: The stunning model dating Orlando Bloom after his breakup with Katy PerryOrlando Bloom is reportedly dating Swiss model Luisa Laemmel, 28, following his split from Katy Perry. etimes2026 crash coming? ‘Rich Dad Poor Dad’ author Robert Kiyosaki reveals where he’s putting his moneyFinancial expert Robert Kiyosaki is warning of a potential economic downturn around 2026, urging investors to prepare. He advises against traditional investments like the S&P 500 and bonds, instead favoring real assets such as oil, real estate, and food businesses. Kiyosaki also reiterates his long-term support for cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and precious metals, emphasizing patience over short-term trading.
